feed.title: Scholar Alerts — Clean Feed
feed.subtitle: Google Scholar alerts reformatted as individual article entries

entry.title: 90095, USA. 19. Program in Neurogenetics, Department of Neurology, University of California, Los Angeles, CA 90095, USA. 20. Center for Autism Research and ...
entry.content:
Authors: V Warrier, EM Stauffer, QQ Huang, EM Wigdor...

Abstract: Warrier et al., Genetics of cortical organisation and development The genetics of cortical organisation and development: a study of 2,347 neuroimaging phenotypes Short title: Genetics of cortical organisation and development Varun Warrier*1,2, Eva-Maria ...

Tags: Reviewer, too: Neurodiversity

Alert: Varun Warrier (author alert)

entry.title: Worlds Next Door. IV. Mapping the Late Stages of Giant Planet Evolution with a Precise Dynamical Mass and Luminosity for $∊ $ Ind Ab
entry.content:
Authors: A Sanghi, W Thompson, J Mang, J Xuan, D Mawet... - arXiv e-prints, 2026

Abstract: We present new JWST/NIRCam 4-5$ μ $ m (F410M, F430M) and JWST/MIRI 18-25$ μ $ m (F1800W, F2100W, F2550W) imaging detections of the nearby (3.6 pc) cold (275 K) gas giant exoplanet $∊ $ Ind Ab. The F2550W detection of $∊ $ Ind Ab ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Björn Benneke (author alert)

entry.title: Hot Rocks Survey. V. Secondary Eclipse Photometry of GJ 3473 b with JWST/MIRI
entry.content:
Authors: M Holmberg, H Diamond-Lowe, JM Mendonça... - The Astronomical Journal, 2026

Abstract: JWST is transforming our ability to characterize small exoplanets, from sub-Neptunes to rocky worlds. A key open question is whether highly irradiated rocky planets can retain atmospheres or are stripped bare by stellar irradiation—a boundary that ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Exoplanets

Alert: Adam J. Burgasser (author alert)

entry.title: Ammonia as a parameter shaping habitability on icy moons
entry.content:
Authors: CM Hopton, CS Cockell - FEMS Microbes, 2026

Abstract: The search for life now extends beyond the traditional habitable zone to include the icy moons of Jupiter and Saturn. These moons feature ice-covered surfaces overlying substantial oceans formed primarily of liquid water and other potential ...

Tags: Reviewer, Too: Astrobiology

Alert: Charles Cockell (author alert)

entry.title: A PAC-Bayesian approach to generalization for quantum models
entry.content:
Authors: P Rodriguez-Grasa, MC Caro, J Eisert, E Gil-Fuster... - arXiv preprint arXiv ..., 2026

Abstract: Generalization is a central concept in machine learning theory, yet for quantum models, it is predominantly analyzed through uniform bounds that depend on a model's overall capacity rather than the specific function learned. These capacity ...

Alert: Jens Eisert (author alert)

entry.title: Measurement-induced non-commutativity in adaptive fermionic linear optics
entry.content:
Authors: C Cao, Y Tang, J Eisert - arXiv preprint arXiv:2603.24950, 2026

Abstract: Fermionic linear optics (FLO) with Gaussian resources is efficiently classically simulable. We show that this is no longer the case for such quantum circuits for fermions with internal degrees of freedom, equipped with mid-circuit number ...

Alert: Jens Eisert (author alert)
